name: Savannah Indoor Golf Club
about: Savannah Indoor Golf Club is a private indoor golf performance facility providing 24/7 access for members to play, practice, and train on TrackMan 4 simulators. The venue offers certified PGA coaching and instruction, custom fitting of major golf brands, and data-driven practice technologies. Memberships include keyless entry and unlimited putting green use in a climate-controlled environment, with options ranging from 4 to 6 hours of monthly simulator time to unlimited access for serious golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan 4 launch monitors and 4K video analysis for detailed swing feedback
24/7 keyless entry access for flexible practice and play schedules
Over 375 worldwide golf courses available to play, including iconic venues like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Custom club fitting services with major golf brands to optimize equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol services; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor with radar technology, 4K video analysis, and precise ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The facility also offers custom club fitting services with major golf brands if you need equipment optimization.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at the venue, but it doesn't specify a BYOB policy. It's best to contact the facility directly to confirm.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While the exact time isn't specified, simulator sessions typically allow for faster play than real golf, depending on the number of players and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features or junior programs. It appears focused on serious practice and adult instruction.
